key.name: search-engine
key.description: Search engine to use for web searches (google, duckduckgo, bing)

key.name: panel-position
key.description: Position index in the panel (0 = leftmost)

key.name: panel-box
key.description: Which box to place the widget in (left, center, right)

key.name: usage-history
key.description: JSON object tracking search frequency and recency for predictions

key.name: max-predictions
key.description: Number of predictive suggestions to display (0-5)
